title: Privacy Policy
s1_body1: pTrack ("we", "us", "our") is a plastic waste tracking application developed as an ALU capstone project, currently piloting in the Kimironko sector of Kigali, Rwanda.
s2_account_body: full name, email address, phone number, sector, profile picture, and role.
s2_activity_body: waste reports (photo, description, GPS coordinates at the moment of submission, waste type), recycling logs (type, date), and reward points history.
s2_technical_body: IP address and user-agent string, collected only for administrator accounts and used exclusively for audit logging and accountability. Users are informed of this collection before being granted administrator access.
s2_prefs_body: language, theme, notification settings, and leaderboard visibility choice.
s3_li2: Display your activity and points on the leaderboard (opt-in).
s3_li4: Send push/email notifications you have opted into.
s3_footer: We do not sell your data to third parties or use it for advertising.
s4_body1: Your account and activity data is stored on DigitalOcean Managed Database (PostgreSQL). Media files (waste photos and profile pictures) are stored on Cloudinary and served over HTTPS. JWT access tokens expire after 8 hours; refresh tokens expire after 7 days and are rotated on each use.
s4_body2: We apply encryption in transit (TLS 1.2+), input sanitisation, and rate-limiting on all API endpoints. Passwords are hashed using Argon2 (with PBKDF2-SHA256 as a legacy fallback). In the event of a data breach affecting your personal information, we will notify affected users by email within 72 hours of becoming aware of the incident.
s5_li1: Request a copy of all data we hold about you.
s5_li3: Request deletion of your account and all associated data.
s5_li4: Opt out of the leaderboard in Settings → Privacy.
s5_li5: Withdraw consent for notifications in Settings → Notifications.
s5_footer_post: . We respond within 48 hours to 7 days depending on the complexity of the request.
s6_cloudinary: stores uploaded images. Images are publicly accessible via their URL; do not upload photos containing sensitive personal information.
s6_render: hosts our backend application server. See Render's Data Processing Agreement for their data-handling obligations. Linking to a processor's DPA is standard practice and reflects our transparency commitment.
s6_maps: is linked to for directions (opens externally). We do not proactively share user data with Google Maps.
s7_body: pTrack is not directed to children under 16. We do not knowingly collect data from minors. If you believe a minor has created an account, contact us and we will delete it promptly.
s8_body: We may update this policy to reflect changes in the app or legal requirements. Material changes will be notified via an in-app banner at least 14 days in advance. Continued use after 30 days of notification constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
s9_body1: pTrack captures GPS coordinates only at the moment you submit a waste report. We do not request access to your location in the background, and we do not track or record your movements between sessions. When you tap "My location" on the report form, your device's standard location permission dialog will appear — you may decline and manually position the map pin instead.
s9_body2: We recognise that other applications or services on your device may collect or share location data independently of pTrack. If you believe your privacy has been compromised in connection with your pTrack account or data — whether through our platform or a related service — contact us immediately at d.tunyinko@alustudent.com. We will investigate and provide a written response within 48 hours.
s10_body1: To support offline functionality, pTrack uses your browser's local storage (for session preferences and authentication tokens) and IndexedDB (to store waste reports, recycling logs, and profile changes made while you are offline).
s10_body2: This offline data remains on your device and is transmitted to our servers only when your internet connection is restored. You may clear this data at any time through your browser's site settings. Clearing local storage will log you out of the app.
s11_body: Your account data and activity history are retained for as long as your account is active. If you request account deletion, all personal data — including waste reports, recycling logs, points history, and profile information — is permanently deleted within 30 days of the request. Anonymised aggregate statistics (e.g., total reports in a sector) may be retained indefinitely as they cannot be used to identify you. Audit logs for administrator accounts are retained for 12 months.
